title: Brexit
subtitle: Britain's Exit from the European Union
description: Nigel Farage dedicated over 25 years to the cause of British independence from the EU. From founding UKIP in 1993 to leading the Leave campaign in 2016, Brexit was his life's work.

keyDates.event: Co-founds UKIP to campaign for EU withdrawal

title: Immigration
subtitle: Border Control and Migration Policy
description: Immigration has been central to Farage's political message. He argues for strict border controls, reduced net migration, and leaving international conventions that limit deportations.
keyPositions: Leave the European Convention on Human Rights

title: The European Union
subtitle: Farage's 17-Year Battle in Brussels
description: Farage served as an MEP from 1999 to 2020, using the European Parliament as a platform to criticise the EU from within. His speeches went viral and made him internationally known.

keyDates.event: Elected as MEP for South East England
Famous 'Who are you?' speech to Van Rompuy
Final speech in EU Parliament before Brexit

title: Reform UK
subtitle: Building a New Political Movement
description: After Brexit was achieved, Farage pivoted to domestic reform. Reform UK aims to challenge the two-party system and has led national polls since 2025.

keyDates.event: Brexit Party rebrands as Reform UK
Farage becomes leader, wins Clacton seat

title: Net Zero & Climate Policy
subtitle: Opposition to Green Policies
description: Farage opposes net zero targets, calling them economically destructive. Reform UK advocates scrapping the 2050 net zero target and expanding fossil fuel production.
keyPositions: Fast-track North Sea oil and gas

title: Donald Trump
subtitle: The Special Relationship
description: Farage was the first foreign politician to meet Trump after his 2016 election. They share political allies, rhetoric, and a mutual admiration.

keyDates.event: First foreign politician to meet President-elect Trump
Spoke at Trump rally during US election

title: NHS & Healthcare
subtitle: Reform UK's Health Policies
description: Reform UK's NHS policies have evolved over time. The party advocates cutting management, training more British doctors, and has discussed insurance-based models.
keyPositions: Train more British doctors and nurses

title: Economy & Taxation
subtitle: Low Tax, Small State
description: Farage advocates for lower taxes, reduced government spending, and economic liberalism. Reform UK proposes abolishing inheritance tax and raising income tax thresholds.
